headline: Did The Market Panic On Oracle’s Best Signal?
summary: It’s easy to look at a stock chart after a big run and feel like you missed the party. ORCL surged more than thirty-eight percent in three months, a significant move for a company of its size. More interesting than the rally itself was the trail of breadcrumbs the company left beforehand.

raw.headline: Did The Market Panic On Oracle’s Best Signal?
raw.summary: It’s easy to look at a stock chart after a big run and feel like you missed the party. ORCL surged more than thirty-eight percent in three months, a significant move for a company of its size. More interesting than the rally itself was the trail of breadcrumbs the company left beforehand.

headline: Is Microsoft Stock Too Cheap To Ignore?
summary: Microsoft (MSFT) stock is at an interesting point right now. If you bet on it, you are betting on a company that's growing reasonably, is sustaining good cash flow and margin, has a low-debt to market cap structure, and is relatively cheaply valued. But is that enough.

headline: How Will Adobe Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
summary: Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) is set to report its earnings on Thursday, June 11, 2026. Heading into the results, the stock has experienced notable pressure, dropping roughly 8% over the past five days as investors heavily scrutinize the company's ability to successfully monetize its generative AI tools.

headline: Salesforce m3ter Deal Highlights Shift Toward Usage Based AI Revenue
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) announced the acquisition of m3ter, a consumption-based metering and billing platform. The company plans to integrate m3ter into Agentforce Revenue Management to support usage-based pricing for AI-focused products and services. The deal highlights Salesforce's push to support customers that want to link software spend more directly to real-time usage. For Salesforce, best known for its subscription-based customer relationship management tools, this move reflects...
